event.content: 1. Debug logs removed — deleted [DEBUG] apply_env prints from config.rs and [DEBUG] build_provider from factory.rs.  2. Sidebar mouse click — this can't be fixed while mouse capture is off (the terminal doesn't forward click events to the app without it — the two  modes are mutually exclusive). Instead, the sidebar chip now shows sidebar:on [^B] / sidebar:off [^B] and Ctrl+B is now a direct shortcut to toggle   it. No leader key needed. Ctrl+X B still works too.  3. Mouse selection — already working, no change needed here. what is this?

1. Debug logs removed — deleted [DEBUG] apply_env prints from config.rs and [DEBUG] build_provider from factory.rs.  2. Sidebar mouse click — this can't be fixed while mouse capture is off (the terminal doesn't forward click events to the app without it — the two  modes are mutually exclusive). Instead, the sidebar chip now shows sidebar:on [^B] / sidebar:off [^B] and Ctrl+B is now a direct shortcut to toggle   it. No leader key needed. Ctrl+X B still works too.  3. Mouse selection — already working, no change needed here. what is this?
